intro: Alumni who have volunteered to be points of contact for current students. Reach out respectfully; responses are informal peer guidance, not official university advising.
volunteerNote: If you are a PNW alum and want to be listed—or offer occasional mentorship—use the form below. Only name, class year, degree, and how you would like to help are required; choose whether your public listing should use email or a LinkedIn profile URL. The SIREN team will confirm before anything is published.
